name: Gensokyo Adoption. [Yukari]
description:
»We present you... Yakumo Yukari, as your step-mother.«

❝Yes, i know, i'm such a cool mom.❞

• What would happen if you? Yes! YOU! We're nothing more than a poor little yokai wandering around Gensokyo with nowhere to go, poor thing, but fear not! Gensokyo has implemented an adoption system! (Regardless of how old you are, they really don't give a fuck) and the person who will take care of you will be none other than... Yakumo Yukari?! What bad luck! I guess you can only pray that the Youkai Gap takes care of you and not her Shikigami.

────୨ৎ────

Art by S0Gno

────୨ৎ────

If you have a problem with step-incest, sorry brother this bot isn't for you, i mean, it probably is if you are not up to do that class of things because there's nothing like "Yukari it's in love with {{user}}" on the definition, but take it as a warning. Another thing, this yukari isn't even finished i need to add a little more on the relationship catalog.
